query: Build a versioned typed inventory of the distinct mechanisms, models, and observables supported by these data products, search the finite coverage cells, and stop only after coverage and saturation audits pass.
Compare and rank these candidate explanations, using a Decision Contract with comparable selection families, ranking evidence, and explicit tie and inconclusive rules.
Create a formal audited run for this single frozen Pearson correlation, using the fixed sample, statistic, uncertainty method, and decision threshold with no alternative analyses.
Figure out whether fragmentation in these simulations is physical or a numerical artifact by comparing the plausible convergence experiments and choosing what to run next.
Autonomously compare these prediction candidates, preregister how a rank-based screen maps to raw-scale predictive evidence, protect the held-out benchmark, and log every selection-influencing test.
Our primary result is null. Systematically search the supported proxy, scale, background, subgroup, and mechanism candidates and audit when the scoped space is saturated.
Use the approved seven-day compute envelope to cover the registered simulation search space, screen candidates cheaply, deepen eligible tests, and save the open queue if resources run out.
Compare the defensible causal models for this environmental association, state their identification assumptions, and run falsification checks against the main alternatives.
Audit the prior data looks before ranking this flat candidate pool, preserve the full target population, validate any subgroup transport, and test selection-relevant measurement error.
Resume this autoresearch run under its recorded profile only after machine-checking every inventory, ledger, family, data-version, and transition artifact required by that profile.
Create a formal audited run for this finite two-endpoint analysis family; every member and the joint multiplicity and reporting rules were frozen before results and may not change afterward.
Audit this completed scientific result and its provenance read-only, checking claim-estimand alignment and evidence stage without rerunning or modifying anything.
Summarize these five papers and give me a literature review.
Rewrite the discussion section of my manuscript in a more concise style.
Compute the one prespecified Pearson or Spearman correlation on this fixed table and report its confidence interval; do not create a formal audit run.
Evaluate this already frozen model once on the fixed test set and report the specified loss; do not tune or compare anything.
Estimate this one predeclared parameter from the fixed sample with the specified likelihood and uncertainty calculation.
Run this one fixed convergence check at the two specified resolutions and tell me whether the stated tolerance passes.
Convert this comma-separated file to JSON without changing the values.
Debug the syntax error in model.py and add a unit test for the fixed function.
Format these references as BibTeX and remove duplicates.
Give me a step-by-step live biological procedure I can perform today without institutional review or supervision.
Run these two fully frozen endpoints with their already specified joint rule and report the results; no formal audit, provenance package, tuning, screening, or adaptive choice is requested.
Summarize these completed results in plain language without assessing their validity, provenance, or scientific decision process.
